regions.text: Writing a word uses feedback from letters and knowledge of spelling. This only works because you 'fed forward' the word you intended to write.
Sentences depend on paragraphs, paragraphs on chapters, and chapters on the whole book. Each level provides a general direction for the smaller parts.
What is 'general'? (Diagram: Concentric circles showing categories: YOU -> MEN -> ANIMALS -> ORGANISMS -> EVERYTHING). Each outer circle is more general.
paragraph: a group of sentences. chapter: a section of a book. FUTURE: will write. PRESENT: write(s). PAST: wrote, written.
